name: White Christmas Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red & Green Candied Cherries, Diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8x8-inch pan with butter for the finished fudge.
2. Lightly oil a large, heavy-bottomed saucepan.
3. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and cream in the saucepan.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Increase the heat to moderate and heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
6. Heat until the mixture reaches 240°F (soft ball stage), without stirring.
7. Remove from heat. Beat immediately until it begins to lose its gloss and starts to get stiff.
8. Add vanilla.
9. Slowly stir in nuts and fruit.
10. Pack into the prepared pan and chill.
11. Cut into small squares when cool.
12. Store in an airtight container in a cool place for up to weeks.
